title: podochilus malabaricus
intro: Podochilus malabaricus is an orchid species native to the Western Ghats in India. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which are traditionally used to treat various health issues. The roots of Podochilus malabaricus have been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, offering potential health benefits such as wound healing, fever reduction, and relief from respiratory problems. Traditionally, the roots are used to prepare herbal preparations, including decoctions and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
